customer_issue:
Customer is unable to log into the system.
Customer receives an 'internal server error' message when trying to log in.
Customer requested the issue ID for their reference.
Customer requested to be notified of their issue ID directly.
Customer specifically requested to receive their issue ID as a notification.
Customer is also unable to reset their password in addition to the login issue.
Customer is unable to see their listing on wmt.com in addition to login and password reset issues.
Customer requested a separate case for the issue of not seeing their listing on wmt.com.
Customer clarified that the listing visibility issue is not connected to the login or password problems.
summary: Listing visibility issue is separate from login/password issues. Ready to create a new case for this.
suggested_response: Thank you for clarifying. We will create a separate case for your listing visibility issue on wmt.com and track it independently from your login and password issues.

policy.update_enforcement_reason: Detected blocked money, missing urgent order, or inability to complete an important task.
